title: helichrysum aureolum
intro: Helichrysum aureolum, also known as the golden everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum aureolum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum aureolum include essential oils, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, wounds, and other conditions.
